_meta.experiment: Close 3 gaps: literal black-box (teacher-generated corpus) + K3 decomposition + MoE distillation
_meta.task: gsm8k flexible-extract, 5-shot, limit=150, lm-eval official; LoRA-KD rank-64 batched

black_box_literal_Qwen2.5-1.5B_K2.verdict: LITERAL black-box CONFIRMED: cross-entropy on the FP teacher's OWN greedy generations recovers 0->0.247 (~77% of the white-box gain), near-identical to CE on gold task data (0.227). This CORRECTS the earlier Paper H wording ('CE on teacher responses = 0.227' -- that number was actually gold-CE); the literal teacher-generated number is 0.247. logit-KD adds only +0.02, ApiQ-init +0.07 (needs teacher weights).

K3_decomposition_Qwen2.5-1.5B.verdict: At K3 the three ingredients are more evenly split (~+0.05 each): black-box/CE-only 0.43, +ApiQ 0.49, white-box 0.54 (K3-PTQ floor 0.38). Even the black-box path beats K3-PTQ.

MoE_OLMoE-1B-7B_CAVEATED.CAVEAT: INVALID as a faithful full-MoE test. sasori fake_quant_ reached only 64 linears (attention + router); OLMoE stores its expert FFN weights as a fused non-nn.Linear tensor, which stayed FP. So this ternarized ONLY attention/router, not the experts (the bulk of params). K2 collapses (0.033) and distillation recovers to ~FP (0.36), but that measures attention-only ternarization+recovery on a MoE model, NOT full-MoE ternarization. NOT put in the paper. A faithful MoE test requires custom quantization of the fused expert weights -- open follow-up.
